Name: Roxtec Group
Description:
Roxtec cable and pipe seals protect life and assets. The flexible solutions ensure safety, efficiency and operational reliability in demanding projects worldwide. The innovative cable and pipe transits from Roxtec simplify design and engineering, speed up installation and reduce the need for stock, material and logistics. Roxtec is a global company with a strong local presence serving customers in many industries and in more than 80 markets through subsidiaries and distributors.

Roxtec was founded in Sweden in 1990 with the invention of Multidiameter, a solution for adaptability to cables and pipes of different sizes based on sealing modules with removable layers. This flexible concept revolutionized the process of cable routing and pipe installation, simplifying design, speeding up installation work and reducing the need for stock, material and logistics.

Today, Roxtec supplies sealing solutions as well as design services and tools to many international projects within marine, offshore oil and gas, power, process industries, infrastructure and equipment manufacturing.

Protecting life and assets
The Roxtec sealing system protects against fire, gas, water, dust, blast, pests, pressure and temperature changes. It also reduces noise, vibration and material fatigue, and exists in versions for EMC, hazardous locations (Ex) and bonding, grounding and lightning protection.

The system is certified by all major classification authorities. Roxtec products count 285 certificates, including IECEx/ATEX and MED, as well as 430 registered tests and approvals.

The seals are used worldwide to ensure safety, efficiency and operational reliability. They are also appreciated for the clean installation process, the area efficiency and the adaptability to a wide range of cables, metal pipes and plastic pipes. The ability to open up the seals to add cables or make quick changes simplifies maintenance and retrofit.

Name: Zenith Industrial Rubber Products Pvt Ltd
Description:
Zenith Rubber has been at the forefront of manufacturing industrial rubber products since 1965.

Zenith Industrial Rubber Products Private Limited, has been a leading manufacturer and exporter of high-quality industrial rubber sheeting products since its establishment in 1965. Over the years, Zenith has achieved remarkable success in the global market and has become recognized as a trusted supplier.

With a strong focus on delivering excellence, Zenith offers a diverse range of products including wear-resistant rubber sheets, antiskid flooring, waterproofing membranes, coated fabrics, rubber inflatables, rubber moulded and extruded profiles. Name: Darson Industries

Name: Roxtec România
Description:
Povestea Roxtec începe în anul 1990 odată cu inventarea tehnologiei 𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢𝐝𝐢𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐫, o tehnologie bazată pe 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗶 𝗱𝗲𝘁𝗮𝘀̦𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗲 pentru o 𝗽𝗼𝘁𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗲 𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙚𝙘𝙩𝙖̆ la cabluri și țevi de diferite dimensiuni și care simplifică proiectarea, instalarea și verificarea trecerilor prin diferite structuri. Evitați surprizele provocate de modificările de ultimă ora și reduceți stocurile. Modulele sunt întotdeauna pregătite pentru viitoare modernizări și gestionează fără probleme un număr mare de cabluri și țevi.

Soluțiile inovatoare de la Roxtec oferă o 𝒑𝒓𝒐𝒕𝒆𝒄𝒕̦𝒊𝒆 𝒎𝒖𝒍𝒕𝒊𝒑𝒍𝒂̆ împotriva focului, apei, gazelor, rozătoarelor, factorilor de mediu (IP), riscurilor de explozie (Ex), sau a poluării electromagnetice. Acestea rezistă la cele mai dificile medii de lucru, la presiunea constantă a apei, la coroziune și la fluctuații de temperatură. De asemenea atenuează zgomotul și includ soluții eficiente pentru punere la masă, împământare, sau compatibilitate EMC. Ele au un ciclu de viață ridicat și au posibilitatea 𝐫𝐞𝐟𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐬𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐢 pentru instalarea de noi cabluri, țevi, sau tuburi din plastic. Pentru selectarea celei mai potrivite soluții tehnice Roxtec România asigură atât suport tehnic, cât și cursuri de instalare, sau inspecții tehnice la fața locului, oferind și un termen rapid de livrare datorită existenței 𝐝𝐞𝐩𝐨𝐳𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐥𝐮𝐢 din Constanța.

Datorită acestor avantaje, dar și a cercetării continue, Roxtec a devenit lider global în domeniul soluțiilor de etanșare, cu prezență în mai mult de 80 de țări la nivel global, având peste 285 de produse standard – dar și peste 3.000 de produse personalizate pe an - cu peste 430 de certificate, teste, sau aprobări. În plus, am dezvoltat suita de aplicații 𝐑𝐨𝐱𝐭𝐞𝐜 𝐒𝐨𝐟𝐭𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐒𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐞 pentru a simplifica lucrul în orice etapă - de la proiectare, schițe, aprovizionare și certificate - până la instalare, verificări de calitate și documentații obligatorii

A renovação sistemática de embalagens e lançamento de novos produtos são fatores determinantes para acompanhar a velocidade das mudanças impostas pela globalização, propiciando constantemente inovações e aperfeiçoamento tecnológico.

Name: Arsan
Description:
Arsan, Yapısal ve Sismik Mesnetler, Genleşme Derzleri, Boru Contaları ve Tünel Segment Contaları konusunda sektörünün lider kuruluşudur.

Arsan, 1957’den bu yana sürekli gelişme odaklı politikası ile büyümeye,  sürekli olarak yenilikçi projeler üzerinde çalışmaya devam etmektedir.  Dünya çapında güvenilir yapısal ürün tedarikçisi olmayı hedefleyen Arsan, 50’den fazla ülkeye ihracat yapmaktadır ve yaptığı ihracatın büyük çoğunluğunu Batı Avrupa ülkeleri oluşturmaktadır. Üretiminin % 65’ini ihraç etmektedir.  

Yapısal mesnetler; her türlü elastomerik mesnetler, tek yönlü ve sabit mesnetler, pot mesnetler, küresel ve silindirik mesnetleri içerir. Arsan’ın ürettiği her türlü yapısal mesnet CE Belgesine sahiptir.  

Arsan, kurşun çekirdekli kauçuk mesnetler (LRB) ve sürtünme sarkaç sistemlerini kullanarak, köprüler ve binalar için sismik izolasyon sistemleri sunmaktadır. Arsan test laboratuvarı, yapısal mesnetler ve sismik izolatörler üzerinde yeterlilik ve kabul testleri yapmak için donatılmıştır. Fabrika üretim kontrol testleri standartlara ve müşteri taleplerinde belirtilen proje gereksinimlerine göre Arsan fabrikasında yapılmaktadır.  

Arsan tarafından köprüler için elastomerik genleşme derzi (SEM), tek açıklıklı ve modüler genleşme derzleri üretilmektedir.

Genleşme derzi tipi ve tasarımı proje gereksinimlerine göre hazırlanmaktadır.  

Tünel segment contaları Arsan mühendisleri tarafından, öngörülen su basıncına uygun olarak tasarlanmaktadır.  

Arsan boru sektörü için içme suyu, atık su, gaz ve kimyasal borulara uygun olarak, belgeli karışımlar ile sızdırmazlık ürünleri üretmektedir.

Arsan fabrikası Sakarya’da Ferizli de 60.000 m² alan üzerinde kurulu 35.000 m² kapalı alanı bulunan tesisinde faaliyet göstermektedir.

Name: Marangoni Brasil
Description:

A nossa reconstrução transforma o mundo porque você faz parte disso com a gente.

Possui também uma unidade de produção de compostos não pretos, em prédio totalmente separado da planta principal, evitando assim, qualquer tipo de contaminação com negro de fumo.

Name: MCT Brattberg
Description:
MCT Brattberg is the inventor of the Multi Cable Transit seal. World leader in the design, development and manufacture of Multi Cable and Pipe transits. It has evolved to become stronger over the years in response to meeting the ever tougher demands on product quality and certification.

The round RGP frame was introduced in the 1970s. At first it was designed for core-drilled holes in concrete. Today it is even installed in the decks and bulkheads of ships.

Lycron rubber for our insert blocks was introduced in 1986. The same year saw the launch of the composite compression plate with integrated compression bolt. Pre-lubricated blocks, a long awaited feature that saves a great deal of time during installation, arrived in 1994.

In 1997 we introduced AddBlock, the universal block, which soon became a success. In certain markets today AddBlock dominates. U-blocks and Plugs arrived in 1999. These together with AddBlocks provide cable and pipe transits with increased flexibility for solving problems in the best and easiest way.

2017, MCT Brattberg introduced the Handiblock. This module compliments our existing system.  It gives you greater flexibility without the doubt!

Today, the company is a modern industrial business with the MCT Brattberg System as main product. An extensive global dealer network ensures the product's availability in most markets. Exports from Sweden constitute roughly 95% of sales. 

MCT Brattberg, always 'Putting Safety First' whatever we do !

Name: Granuband
Description:
Granuband, established in 1991, is a frontrunner in the tyre recycling industry, operating from the strategic location of the Port of Amsterdam. As pioneers in our field, we specialize in tyre collection, tyre recycling, and the manufacturing of sustainable and circular rubber products sourced from from End-of-Life Tyres (ELTs).
 
In the Netherlands, approximately 9.5 million car tyres are discarded annually, posing a significant environmental challenge. At Granuband, we are dedicated to addressing the environmental impact of this waste by transforming it into green opportunities. Through innovative processes, we recover valuable materials from used tyres and repurpose them in the most sustainable and high-quality manner possible. Our renewed raw materials and our circular rubber products are proudly marketed internationally under the trademark Granuflex. 

At Granuband, we are committed to giving millions of used tyres a new lease on life, reducing their environmental impact. With our focus on innovation and sustainability, we aim to shape a more sustainable future for generations to come.

Name: Drebor Borrachas
Description:
A Drebor tem origem na história de conhecimento, competência e persistência de uma família que atua no segmento de reconstrução de pneus desde a décadada de 60, uma história de trabalho e desenvolvimento tecnológico no setor de transporte.

A indústria e toda estrutura de apoio e desenvolvimento da tecnologia Drebor/SPD e de serviços dedicados aos seus concessionários em todo Brasil está instalada em Cuiabá - MT, em uma área de 21 hectares. A Drebor se orgulha de ser a única indústria do segmento que possui um sistema de reconstrução de pneus com patente reconhecida pelo INPI - Instituto Nacional de Propriedade Industrial.

São mais de 35 anos de crescimento constante e evolução tecnológica desenvolvida pela Drebor, o que confere o reconhecimento nacional para os seus produtos e, especialmente, à tecnologia aplicada na reforma de pneus para o transporte de carga.

Name: Roxtec France
Description:
ROXTEC France est une filiale de la société ROXTEC International AB basée en Suède.

Le système d'étanchéité ROXTEC est développé pour protéger la vie et les biens. Adaptable aux câbles et aux tuyaux de différentes tailles, nos solutions sont utilisées pour assurer la sécurité, l'efficacité et la fiabilité opérationnelle dans des projets à travers le monde.

Des traversées sécurisées et certifiées
Nos traversées protègent les personnes et le matériel contre les risques provoqués, par exemple, par le feu, le gaz, l'eau, la poussière, les rongeurs, les effets de souffle.
Ce système testé et homologué par tous les principaux instituts de certification est utilisé dans une vaste gamme d'applications.

Multidiameter par ROXTEC
Notre invention pour répondre aux besoins d'adaptabilité, Multidiameter, est une solution basée sur des modules en élastomère à couches pelables. Elle permet d'avoir une étanchéité parfaite, quelle que soit la dimension extérieure du câble ou de la tuyauterie. Cette solution simplifie la conception, accélère l'installation et réduit les besoins de stockage, de matériaux et de logistique. Elle offre également une capacité supplémentaire pour les modifications ultérieures.

The plant is designed to maximize operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, and environmental sustainability. As part of its commitment to sustainability, the company has implemented a cooling tower system that enables water recycling, thereby minimizing industrial water consumption and reducing environmental impact. With a well-structured financial foundation and a leadership team with extensive industry expertise, Primeflex is positioned for long-term scalability, market expansion, and global competitiveness.
Primeflex Rubber Private Limited aims to be a leader in sustainable rubber manufacturing, driving industry innovation while ensuring environmental responsibility and operational excellence. By replacing traditional steam-based vulcanization with microwave and hot air curing, the company achieves a low-emission, energy-efficient production model.
Through advanced material processing, stringent quality assurance, and a commitment to continuous improvement, Primeflex is dedicated to delivering high-performance rubber solutions that align with global sustainability standards. The company's strategic focus on water conservation, eco-friendly production, and process optimization ensures its long-term success in an evolving industrial land

Name: American Classic
Description:
American Classic exemplifies the pinnacle of performance bicycle engineering and innovation. Nearly 40 years ago, founder Bill Shook was a talented professional road racer who raced for the US National Team. A drive to create better, lighter products inspired him to start experimenting in his garage, engineering his own aluminum bicycles and components. Shook unveiled American Classic in 1982 with bottle cages and a micro-adjust seatpost, then quickly moved into other component designs, becoming a leader in lightweight innovation.

A global search for the finest production facilities led American Classic to form an early partnership with Taiwanese manufacturers in the mid-’90s, which in turn led to the first American Classic factory in Taichung. Obsessive control on every product from prototype to manufacturing at scale fast-tracked American Classic to be a leader in aftermarket wheels. Its product offering made no sacrifice and spared no expense, delivering a forward-thinking, lightweight design with a heritage that was equal parts racing and engineering.

Once again, American Classic is rewriting the rule book with industry-leading manufacturing facilities and a complete line of gravel, road, and commuter tires — with more component offerings to come. Tires are often an afterthought of the bicycle’s design, though recent developments in American Classic’s rubber technologies allow us to push forward with innovation that delivers our heritage.

Name: Treco Kauçuk ve Kimyasalları San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti.
Description:
Treco serves a wide range of customers and sectors with quality expectations on a wide scale from automotive to textile, furniture to machinery, sealing elements to medical, and construction to food. Regardless of molding methods (injection, transfer, compression, extrusion, extrusion, air tunnel, autoclave), Treco produces technical rubber compounds for all kinds of quality expectations.
In 2002, Treco started its activities by importing rubber raw materials in Bursa. Treco has continued its activities in the sector selling various rubber raw materials and rubber-metal adhesives. Treco has become a well-known and sought-after company with the support provides to customers on technical issues.
In 2008, the company partially ended the import/sale of raw materials moved to its new location in Çalı / BURSA region, and started rubber compounding by investing in a new Banbury mixer.
In 2010, with the 2nd new line investment, Treco moved to its new location with 4050 m² open and 3200 m² closed area in the NOSAB industrial zone and continued its growth by increasing its production every year after this date.
In 2014, the company structure with three partners was changed and a single-partner structure was formed.
In 2016, the capacity increased to 800 tons/month with a new line investment. Treco Kauçuk mainly produces rubber compound mixtures for the automotive industry. Treco develops technical compounds with NR/BR/SBR content and dynamic working properties.
In July 2017, the company moved to Görükle Industrial Zone with a total area of 3865 m² and a closed area of approximately 3326 m².
In 2020, Treco had an investment for two more lines first one consisting of Pomini VIC95, Troester mill, and Prodicon batch-off. The second one is HF GK190E, Rodolfo Comorio Mill, and VMI MHD III full-automized with a pallet stacker.
With the new Mesnac calender line investment in 2023, Treco started to meet the calendered compound needs of especially air spring manufacturers in 2024.

Name: MCT Brattberg USA
Description:
MCT Brattberg is the inventor of the Multi Cable Transit seal. World leader in the design, development and manufacture of Multi Cable and Pipe transits. It has evolved to become stronger over the years in response to meeting the ever tougher demands on product quality and certification.

The round RGP frame was introduced in the 1970s. At first it was designed for core-drilled holes in concrete. Today it is even installed in the decks and bulkheads of ships.

Lycron rubber for our insert blocks was introduced in 1986. The same year saw the launch of the composite compression plate with integrated compression bolt. Pre-lubricated blocks, a long awaited feature that saves a great deal of time during installation, arrived in 1994.

In 1997 we introduced AddBlock, the universal block, which soon became a success. In certain markets today AddBlock dominates. U-blocks and Plugs arrived in 1999. These together with AddBlocks provide cable and pipe transits with increased flexibility for solving problems in the best and easiest way.

2017, MCT Brattberg introduced the Handiblock. This module compliments our existing system.  It gives you greater flexibility without the doubt!

Today, the company is a modern industrial business with the MCT Brattberg System as main product. An extensive global dealer network ensures the product's availability in most markets. Exports from Sweden constitute roughly 95% of sales. 

MCT Brattberg, always 'Putting Safety First' whatever we do !

Name: ADManufacturers
Description:
AD Manufacturers is a startup that began operations in 2021. Aloysious Dsouza is the fonder and Director. Their goal is to make rubberized roads a reality in India. They have launched our product ‘Crumb Rubber’; and intend to sell it to road contractors to lay rubberized roads. While their primary intention is to use the crumb rubber in road construction, they can also use it for various purposes. E.g., Children’s Playgrounds, Sports Surfaces, Geotechnical/Asphalt Applications, Adhesives and Sealants, Shock Absorption, and Safety Products. At AD Manufacturers, they believe in Reuse – Reduce – Recycle. In simple words, they recycle worn-out tyres and produce crumb rubber that can be used for various purposes.

Worn-out tyres are categorized as solid or hazardous waste. There is a rapid growth in the utilization and manufacturing of automobiles. Usage of two-wheelers and four-wheelers in India has resulted in massive wastage of used and worn-out tyres, tremendously increasing environmental pollution. Therefore, it is necessary to find an alternative for the consumption of discarded rubber tyre. And that is exactly where A D Manufacturers come into picture.

The main objective of this project is to utilize worn-out tyres in road construction. They procure tyres from different parts of the world, including India, and disintegrate them into smaller pieces. During the process, they also remove impurities and metal that are present in the tyres. Then, they devulcanize the tyres. Devulcanization is the process of using chemical agents to break the Carbon-Sulfur (C-S) or Sulfur-Sulfer (S-S) bonds. They may also combine this with Thermal and Mechanical energy. This helps speed up the Devulcanization process. After Devulcanization, they refine the outcome to produce crumb rubber that they will use to construct roads.

The company was established under the leadership of a seasoned rubber technologist, widely respected for his deep expertise in rubber science. Over the course of his distinguished career, he has developed numerous rubber compound formulations tailored to critical applications in industries such as Indian Railways, Automotive, Pharmaceuticals, Valves, Food Processing, and the Grain Milling Industry.

One of his most acclaimed innovations is a non-toxic rubber compound developed specifically for Food Contact Materials—notably de-blinding balls used in grain screening processes. This proprietary formulation was the first in India to successfully pass comprehensive compliance tests under CFR 21 US FDA 177.2600 and EU Regulation 1935/2004, certified by SGS Laboratories. This milestone set a new industry standard for safety and regulatory compliance in rubber FCMs.

At SAIGOMA, we are driven by a commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction. We take pride in delivering customized, regulatory-compliant rubber solutions designed to meet the rigorous demands of global industries.

Name: ABL Materials
Description:
ABL Materials is a trusted provider of high-performance adhesives, coatings, and repair compounds, specifically designed for conveyor belt maintenance and industrial material applications. We specialize in durable, wear-resistant solutions that extend the lifespan of conveyor systems in cement plants, mining & quarrying operations, chemical processing facilities, waste management plants, and agriculture & grain handling systems.

Our engineered polymer coatings, rubber repair compounds, and industrial adhesives are developed to maximize uptime, reduce maintenance costs, and enhance operational efficiency in harsh environments.

Product Lines:

 Conveyor Belt Repair Systems – Fast-curing rubber repair compounds and flexible adhesives for belt patching, edge repair, and surface restoration.
 Abrasion-Resistant Coatings – High-durability protective coatings that prevent wear, impact damage, and corrosion in heavy-duty applications.
 Pulley Lagging & Wear Liners – Engineered rubber, ceramic, and composite solutions that improve traction and reduce belt slippage.
 Rubber-to-Metal Bonding Adhesives – Strong industrial-grade adhesives for pulley lining, patching, and structural repairs.
 Cold Vulcanizing Compounds – Easy-to-apply solutions for seamless rubber-to-rubber and rubber-to-metal bonding, eliminating the need for hot vulcanization.
 Chemical-Resistant Coatings – Protective barrier coatings that withstand aggressive chemicals, extreme temperatures, and abrasive slurries.
From belt splicing and pulley lagging to abrasion-resistant coatings and industrial bonding adhesives, ABL Materials is the go-to partner for companies looking to extend conveyor system life, reduce maintenance costs, and improve operational efficiency.

Name: Polymer Products Corporation
Description:
Polymer Products Corporation is a member of "The Product Group of Companies" involved in multifarious operations ranging from Rubber, Plastics, Chemical, Aluminium, Glass and catering to the most demanding applications.

V-FLEX ELASTOMER PIPE INSULATION
Elastomeric insulations are widely used in Heat preservation of Central air-conditioning system, chilled water pipes, condensate pipes, air ducts and hot-water pipes of HVAC equipments. It is the preferred material for low temperature pipe lines because of the moisture-proof property.

V-Flex an "Elastomer pipe Insulation" is closed cell, fibre free and hence completely non porous. V-Flex is made from synthetic rubber with closed cells. it is light, extremely flexible and durable insulation for liquid cooling and heating lines.
V-Flex is available in popular sizes ranging from nominal wall thickness of 3/8" to 1 ½"

V-MEMBRANES :
PPC EPDM membrane is an elastomeric compound that is manufactured from ethylene, propylene, and a small amount of diene monomer. These ingredients are synthesised to produce a product that exhibits a high degree of ozone, ultraviolet, weathering and abrasion resistance, and outstanding low temperature flexibility.

These ingredients also contribute to resistance to acids, alkalis, and oxygenated solvents (i.e., ketones, esters, and alcohols).

V-GASKETS:
EPDM gaskets are the most tested and widely used sealing technique, reliable sealing of media over a long period of time, it has also outstanding sealing properties in extreme weather conditions and excellent temperature stability (–40° to +150°C) in cold climate.

If compared to gaskets made from other materials, EPDM gaskets are extremely resistant to wear, ageing, weather influences, ozone and UV-light.

EPDM gaskets are colour-stable and leave no stains on PVC window frames.

Name: Motive Rubber
Description:
Motive Rubber’ın, Türkiye’deki yolculuğu, Spor salonlarına özel soğuk pres kauçuk zemin sistemlerini  2018 yılında  “Kalitenin Getirdiği, Motive” sloganı ile başladı.

Türkiye’de spor salonları aldığı aletlere ne kadar özeniyorsa zeminde kaliteli bir alternatif olmadığı için aşınma ve koku sorunu olan kauçukları tercih ediyorlardı.

Bu duruma kaliteli bir çözüm olarak Dünya ile aynı anda soğuk pres kauçuk sistemlerinin satışına başladık. Soğuk pres kauçuk zeminlerimizde, Aşınmazlık Garantisi, Koku salınımı çok düşük özel üretim, Temizliği kolay parlak teflon efektli yüzey, 1. Kalite Alman hammadde, Adele sakatlığı özel  mühendislik, Ses ve Darbe emici formül standart gelmektedir.

 
Moitve Rubber ve Bahçe Çim Hali;  Motive Group şirketinin markasıdır. Soğuk Pres Kauçuk ve Cold Press Rubber isimleri firmamızın tescilidir.
 
Motive Rubber  Türkiye olarak, profesyonel Niş üretim olan soğuk pres kauçuk zeminlerini Avrupa ülkelerinden gelen taleplere cevap vermektedir.

Türkiye operasyonunda, 2000 üzerinde kurulumla ve en iyi profesyonel salonlarda bulunmasıyla, hem üretim, hem satış, hem de kendi ekibiyle kurulum yapan Pazarın kalite odaklı tek markasıdır.

Name: Hengshui Muchen Rubber Products Co.,Ltd
Description:
MUCHEN HOSE has been specializing in the manufacturing of hydraulic hoses and fittings for nearly 20 years in China. Our products are widely used in demanding environments such as high temperature, high pressure, extreme cold, abrasion, and chemical resistance. We provide custom hydraulic hoses and industrial hoses tailored to meet customer requirements, and all our hoses comply with international standards, such as SAE, EN, ISO etc, making them a reliable alternative to other brands.

Located in Hengshui, China, MUCHEN HOSE employs more than 100 experienced staff members and offers a full range of products, including hydraulic hoses, industrial hoses, sandblast hoses, and fittings for machinery.

With over 20 advanced hose production lines, including high-speed steel wire braiding machines, spiral winding machines, and automatic cutting and winding equipment, our factory achieves a daily production capacity of more than 15,000 meters of hoses. Supported by skilled workers, professional engineers, and a dedicated quality control team, we ensure every product delivered to our customers is of consistent and stable quality.

For nearly two decades, MUCHEN HOSE has been supplying both domestic and international markets, serving customers across industries such as construction, mining, agriculture, oil & gas, transportation, and more.

At MUCHEN HOSE, quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction are our top priorities. We continue to invest in innovation and advanced manufacturing to provide durable hose solutions for industries worldwide.

Name: Rubber Pakking Shop
Description:
Zelf een rubber pakking maken of uw rubber afdichting laten maken

Maak zelf uw rubber pakking en afdichting door deze te snijden of te knippen van plaatrubber. Rubber afdichtingsringen, vierkante en ronde flenspakkingen in oliebestendig, weersbestendig, voedselbestendig en benzinebestendige rubberplaat en nog veel meer rubberkwaliteiten zijn mogelijk.

Op maat gemaakte rubber pakkingen

Het is ook mogelijk om rubber pakkingen te laten maken. Met onze plotters kunnen wij elke gewenste afdichting, rubber ring of rubber pakking snijden vanuit PDF, DWG of DXF file. U kunt een tekening opsturen via de Offerte op maat pagina. Wij doen ons best u binnen een dag een offerte op maat te sturen. Maar uiteraard leveren wij ook plaatrubber in allerlei afmetingen zodat u zelf rubberpakkingen, afdichtingen of ringen kunt maken.

Universele pakkingsplaten

U kunt zelf uw rubber pakking of rubber ring maken door deze te snijden of te knippen van plaatrubber, daarvoor hebben wij in onze webshop een ruime keuze uit rubber platen in diverse afmetingen en in vele rubberkwaliteiten om oliebestendige, weersbestendige, voedselbestendige en benzinebestendige afdichtingen te maken.

Standaard flensafdichtingen

Een veel gebruikte afdichting is de ronde flensafdichting met en zonder boutgaten (bijvoorbeeld DN-afdichtingen). Daarom hebben wij een eenvoudige manier om standaard rubber flensafdichtingen aan te vragen. Omdat wij deze pakkingen zelf maken kunnen wij ook deze rubber pakkingen snel leveren in alle afmetingen, diktes en rubber materialen.

Advies op maat

Mocht u zelf geen keuze kunnen maken uit de vele soorten plaatrubber en mogelijkheden welke wij u bieden kunt u ons altijd om advies vragen. Wij helpen u graag met uw rubber afdichtingsprobleem.

Name: Swani Rubber Industries
Description:
At Swani Rubber Industries, we are redefining sustainability in the global rubber industry. Established in 1970, we are pioneers in reclaim rubber manufacturing, transforming end-of-life tyres and rubber scrap into high-quality reclaimed rubber that powers both tyre and non-tyre sectors around the world.

For over five decades, our journey has been anchored in innovation, responsible stewardship, and operational excellence. With cutting-edge technology and a strong commitment to quality, we deliver superior natural and synthetic reclaim rubber grades that support everything from automotive tires and industrial belts to footwear, flooring materials, and molded parts.

Our mission is clear: to lead the reclaim rubber industry through sustainable practices that reduce environmental impact and create meaningful value for our partners and communities. From eco-friendly sourcing and efficient waste management to renewable energy initiatives and circular-economy principles, our work reflects a deep commitment to global environmental goals.

As a UN Global Compact participant and ECOVADIS gold-rated sustainability performer, we uphold the highest standards in human rights, labor practices, ethics, and environmental responsibility. Our certifications (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001) and global compliance further demonstrate our dedication to excellence and integrity in everything we do.

Headquartered in Mohali (Punjab), India, and serving clients in 20+ countries, Swani Rubber Industries is committed to building a greener and more prosperous future — one reclaimed tyre at a time.

We offer 9 different grades of Millathane polyurethane, each with unique properties and characteristics. Additionally, we have introduced a Millathane UV curing system as an alternative to traditional curing methods. Our Formulary and Technical Data sheets provide detailed information on each grade to help you choose the right one for your project.

Name: Wells Mfg. Co. Brands
Description:
Wells Manufacturing started as a booming toy factory, making quality toys and spreading joy nationwide. In 2004, China moved to undercut U.S. production, leaving manufacturing companies struggling to compete with cheap materials and labor. The results were devasting. Manufacturing plants, once filled with hard work and laughter, were abandoned. Communities like New Vienna, Ohio, were left with unemployed workers. 

Wells Manufacturing stayed alive, but not without wounds. Under new ownership, the lights stayed on. They spent resources and long nights salvaging Well's potential. The machines remained solid and capable. One of the last original workers stayed on in hopes of a revival. 

It took over a decade of innovation and grit, but Wells fought against China's attempt to dominate manufacturing. Today, Wells is successfully manufacturing and breathing life back into USA-made products. The Well's worker who stayed on board is now the director of operations, overseeing multiple product divisions. Wells found a way to climb back to the top by tapping into its legacy of quality manufacturing and pairing it with the needs of today's market. 

Wells product divisions are thriving, yet there will be no letting up. China will make another takedown attempt in the future. With the strength of this legacy and the support of the community, Wells welcomes the challenge.   

Rainbow Mulch is a division of Wells Manufacturing. Rainbow Mulch provides a non-toxic, tire-free rubber surfacing solutions to families and organizations across the country. It is the only rubber surface that is 100% recycled material free and California Proposition 65 complaint. It's most popular for it's superior fall protection, non-toxic, worry-free formula and colorant, modern aesthetic, and outdoor durability. Rainbow Mulch is ASTM safety tested at 3" depth for a 20 ft. critical fall height (safety test ASTM F1292-22). ASTM provides the certifications and testing for national playground standards.

Name: Cruzeiro Gomas Chile

Cuando la fabricación global cambió y los repuestos comenzaron a producirse en Asia, creamos nuestra división de importación para traer productos de los mejores fabricantes del mundo, los cuales distribuimos en nuestras cuatro sucursales en Santiago. Nuestra fábrica, por su parte, se especializó en trabajos técnicos complejos: fabricamos mangueras industriales, juntas de expansión, ductos revestidos de goma y goma cerámico, aglomeradores, trommel y perfiles extruidos para el transporte de sólidos y fluidos en minería, manufactura y transporte industrial. Hoy combinamos lo mejor de dos mundos: la capacidad de fabricación especializada con décadas de expertise, y el acceso a tecnología y productos de clase mundial a través de nuestra red de importación. Esa combinación, respaldada por 80 años de experiencia y adaptación continua, es lo que nos mantiene como referentes en soluciones industriales de goma.

Unsere Stärke sind Membranen und Formteile mit Gewebeverstärkung, PTFE/TFM-Kaschierung, Gummi-Metall- und Gummi-Kunststoffverbindungen. Hierzu verarbeiten wir alle gängigen Elastomere auch mit KTW, FDA und W270 Konformität. Für besondere Anwendungen haben wir auch Spezialelastomere im Programm.

Auf unseren Hydraulikpressen und Spritzgussmaschinen fertigen wir Formteile bis zu einer Größe von 300x300mm präzise und zuverlässig. Durch die Verschiedenartigkeit dieser Arbeitsverfahren sind wir in der Lage, sowohl Vorserien und Kleinmengen als auch größere Serien kostengünstig anzubieten.

Sämtliche Teile fertigen wir nach Ihren Zeichnungen oder Wünschen. Gerne bringen wir unser Know-how bei der Entwicklung oder Zeichnungserstellung mit ein. Kunden profitieren dabei von unserer mehr als 40-jährigen Erfahrung. Als mittelständisches Unternehmen mit ca. 100 Mitarbeitern sind wir sehr flexibel und anpassungsfähig an Ihre Anforderungen.

Name: AK Rubber Spares
Description:
Since 1991, AK Rubber Spares has been a trusted name in providing high-quality rubber and hydraulic components in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR.

We specialize in delivering precision-engineered seals, O- rings, and industrial rubber products. Our commitment to customer satisfaction and top-notch quality has made us a reliable partner in the industry for over three decades.

Our Story
Founded with a vision to provide the highest quality rubber components to industries across India, AK Rubber Spares started as a small workshop in Gurugram. Over the years, we have grown to become one of the most reliable suppliers of rubber and hydraulic parts in the region.

Our Mission
Our mission is to deliver exceptional quality products that meet the precise specifications of our customers. We aim to build long-term relationships through reliability, technical expertise, and outstanding customer service.

Why Choose Us?
30+ years of industry experience
Premium quality O-rings and hydraulic seals
Local expertise in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR
Fast delivery and emergency supplies
Technical support and expert guidance

Name: FAGUMIT Sp. z o. o.
Description: Jesteśmy największym polskim producentem węży gumowych. Nasze produkty spełniają najwyższe normy krajowe i międzynarodowe, znajdując zastosowanie w motoryzacji, przemyśle chemicznym, spożywczym, rolnictwie i wielu innych branżach. Łączymy 30-letnie doświadczenie z innowacyjnymi rozwiązaniami, dostarczając elastyczne i trwałe produkty, na których możesz polegać.

Name: BANDEX • Rubber Bands, Anchor Bands, Made in Spain
Description:
Rubber solutions made to perform — across industries, worldwide.

At Martinsan BANDEX, we manufacture and supply high-quality rubber bands and anchor bands for demanding sectors: industry, automotive, agriculture, viticulture, and healthcare.

 Why choose us?
Our bands are known for their strength, elasticity, and long-lasting performance. From bundling cables to staking plants, from assembling car parts to packaging medical products — we deliver smart, reliable solutions that make a difference.

 Custom-made, export-ready
Need a specific size, strength, or application? We tailor our products to your needs and ship worldwide. With decades of experience, we're proud to support our clients with responsive service and continuous innovation.

 Let’s talk!
Reach out to see how we can help your business grow — or make your supply chain simpler and stronger.

Name: Alanto Ltd
Description: Alanto are an international supplier of foam converted products. Situated in the heart of the UK, Alanto convert foam rubber blocks into sheets, rolls, coils and gaskets. With several decades of experience, we can help you choose the right material for your application.  At Alanto we have an extensive range of stock which includes multiple densities of the following: EPDM, Neoprene, Nitrile PVC, Polyethylene and Polyurethane.  In addition, we also stock a wide range of complimentary adhesive backings. Name: Roxtec Poland
Description:
Roxtec Poland jest spółką zależną firmy Roxtec International AB z siedzibą w Karlskronie w Szwecji.

Grupa Roxtec jest wiodącym dostawcą elastycznych przepustów do rur i kabli. Opiera się na innowacyjnej technologii Multidiameter, opracowanej przez Roxtec w celu prostego dostosowania uszczelnień do kabli i rur o różnych średnicach. Rozwiązanie Multidiameter polega na produkowaniu modułów uszczelniających z odklejanymi listkami, co z kolei ułatwia:
-  planowanie techniczne (nie ma konieczności doboru jednego modułu pod konkretny wymiar kabla, moduły dobiera się pod pewien zakres średnic kabli)
- montaż uszczelnień 
- modernizację przepustu w przypadku wymiany kabla w istniejącym przejściu kablowym

Produkty Roxtec są stale rozwijane i testowane zgodnie z najnowszymi wymogami bezpieczeństwa, aby niezawodnie chronić przed uszkodzeniami spowodowanymi ogniem, wodą, gazem, kurzem oraz zakłóceniami elektromagnetycznymi.

Oprócz certyfikowanych rozwiązań Roxtec oferujemy także pełne wsparcie techniczne i merytoryczne w zakresie doboru uszczelnień na każdym etapie budowy począwszy od wsparcia projektantów (posługując się naszą wiedzą oraz pomocnym narzędziem Roxtec Transit Designer) po doradztwo na budowie (w kwestii oceny montażu przepustu lub przeszkolenia instalatorów).

Z naszymi klientami budujemy długotrwałe relacje oparte na fachowej pomocy i zaangażowaniu. Roxtec jest niezawodnym dostawcą i uznanym partnerem w prawie wszystkich sektorach przemysłu. Branże docelowe to m.in. przemysł stoczniowy, telekomunikacja, energetyka, przemysł chemiczny i rafineryjny, OEM, budownictwo.

Name: Chemical Rubber Company

Name: UNIPOWER TYRE
Description: Qingdao United Power Tire Co., Ltd., headquartered in Qingdao, integrates research, production, sales, and service. Centered on customers, relying on products, market-oriented, and driven by innovation, the company continually enhances its core competitiveness. Upholding the philosophy of pursuing survival through quality and development through innovation, we consistently strengthens ourselves, striving to become an internationally leading tire supply expert and a century-old enterprise.

Name: Deesawala Rubber Industries
Description:
Deesawala Rubber Industries, an ISO 9001- 2015 Company is one of India's leading manufacturer of WRAS , BSEN 681 and IS 5382 Approved  Rubber Gaskets for  ( DI CI, RCC, SWG etc) and have served various industries like DI Pipe Manufactures, Mining, Defense, Telecom, Water boards, Infrastructure companies and Cement companies. In addition, its product range includes a variety of custom molded rubber components.

With almost 20 years of experience in the manufacture of rubber products, Deesawala rubber industries have built up a wealth of expertise in these areas. 

Modern manufacturing facilities at its plant include mixing, calendaring, extruded components.

Our strength lies in the design and manufacture of products with the most stringent technical specifications and quality requirements. 

As a pioneer in the formulation of compounds, the company is skilled in developing customized solutions to the most complex problems. Working hand in hand with its customers, Deesawala rubber develops products for specific requirements and solutions that really work. 

Our manufacturing premises at Hyderabad with state of Art Lab facility is ISO 9001-2015 certified and our Gaskets confirm to WRAS and IS 5382 Bureau of Indian Standards Specifications with ISI mark.

Name: Divekar Wallstabe & Schneider Precision Seals Pvt. Ltd.
Description:

The company is located in Ambivali, Vikramgad (via Wada), Palghar District near Mumbai and employs about 240 people in production and administration. Name: Neumáticos Antártida
Description:

Desde 1971, en Neumáticos Antártida, ofrecemos soluciones de alto rendimiento en la venta de neumáticos nuevos para autos, camionetas, camiones y vehículos fuera de camino. Además, contamos con una planta de recapado de última tecnología, donde aplicamos los estándares de Bridgestone Bandag, garantizando neumáticos seguros, duraderos y eficientes.

Nos destacamos por nuestro Triple Beneficio, una propuesta que reduce el costo por kilómetro, optimizando la inversión en neumáticos recapados.

 Servicios Especializados: gomería, tren delantero, suspensión y frenos.
 Certificación INTI: Primera planta de recapado certificada en Argentina, cumpliendo con los más altos estándares de seguridad y calidad.

- Aprobamos la Aptitud Técnica de la Planta de Reconstrucción
(La cual certifica nuestro proceso productivo)

- Utilizamos materias primas homologadas y certificadas
(Nuestros proveedores deben certificar sus productos)

- Aprobamos con éxito los ensayos dinámicos y estáticos de nuestros neumáticos reconstruidos en máquinas simulando condiciones de uso reales.

Contamos con un equipo de asesoramiento técnico especializado para flotas, brindando confianza y seguridad tanto en neumáticos nuevos como recapados.

Conecta con nosotros y descubrí cómo podemos optimizar la vida útil de tus neumáticos, reduciendo costos sin comprometer la seguridad.

Estamos listos para ayudarte a recorrer más kilómetros!

Name: SRM Industries Ltd
Description:
SRM has over 40 years experience of custom rubber moulding and are one of the leading rubber product manufacturers in the UK with an unparalleled knowledge of injection and compression rubber moulding.

The last 18 months alone has seen SRM invest in 11 new state-of-the-art Maplan injection moulding machines and 2 new Mewo cryogenic de-flashing machines, cementing SRM’s place as a front runner within the industry.

We work across a broad range of industry sectors including: electronic, rail, petrochemical, construction and medical, to name but a few. All our moulds are engineered in-house by our highly skilled toolmakers on CNC machining centres; this gives our customers the peace of mind that we can manage the whole process from initial design through to distribution on time and on budget.

Innovation is at the heart of our business; we are a forward-thinking firm. Through a combination of innovation and technical know-how, we are able to deliver time and again where others stumble. 

We go the extra mile to make it happen.

Name: High Performance Compounds Kauçuk A.Ş.
Description: High Performance Compounds Kauçuk A.Ş. Bursa Hasanağa Sanayi Bölgesi’nde 2016 yılında kurulmuştur. HPC PCK, Ligom S.p.A. şirketinin dahil olduğu TSF S.p.A grubunun ( Italya ) parçasıdır. 1984 yılında kurulan TSF S.p.A., yıllar içerisinde özel kauçuk karışımlarının - Floroelastomerler (FKM) ve Perfluoroelastmers (FFKM), Silikonlar ( VMQ-2002’den beri resmi Wacker İtalya distribütörü), Florosilikonlar (FVMQ)- araştırılması, geliştirilmesi ve pazarlanması konularında az sayıda İtalyan referans şirketlerinden biri haline gelmiştir. Üretim alanımız, maksimum esneklik, hızlı cevap verme ve çapraz kontaminasyonların ortadan kaldırılması için fiziksel olarak ayrılmış hatlardan oluşmaktadır. Pazar yaklaşımımız, sadece otomotiv endüstrisinden değil, beklentinin yüksek olduğu diğer sektörlerde de en zorlu ve güncel şartnameleri karşılamak için geliştirilmiş yüksek teknoloji hamurları sağlamaya dayanmaktadır. Tüm reçetelerimiz sadece belirtilen şartname ve standartları yerine getirmekle kalmayıp, aynı zamanda müşterilerimizin kalite & üretilebilirlik optimizasyonu ihtiyacına cevap verecek şekilde tasarlanmıştır. TSF, Türkiye ve İtalya’daki tesislerinden çok çeşitli ve yüksek kalitede performans hamurları için teklif verebilir. Son ve en önemli olarak, TSF kimyager ve mühendisleri bitmiş ürüne uygun hamur seçimi veya geliştirilmesi konusunda müşteri ile çalışır ve en iyi teknik ve ticari hizmeti sağlamak için vulkanizasyon ve kalıplama için önerilerde bulunabilir.

Name: İSKA Kauçuk Metal Plastik San. ve Tic A.Ş.
Description:
ISKA KAUÇUK METAL PLASTİK SAN. Ve TİC. A.Ş. It was established on 15.03.2008 in İskenderun bay of Hatay and continues its production activities in a 3,500 m² factory building, with 2.250 m² of it closed. ISKA KAUÇUK A.Ş., which used to be producing only for the rubber element needs of the filter industry in the beginning, has today become one of the most wanted brands in the Turkish Rubber industry with its automotive supplier industry, agricultural and livestock sectors, antivibration products, machinery industry and industrial elastomeric products, with the filter industry still as its primary sector.

ISKA KAUCUK A.Ş., which has always been pleased to meet the needs and expectations of its customers in the domestic market without sacrificing quality, has started its export activities since 2010 and continues to supply products for different sectors to four continents today. Our organization, which is the favorite of the European market especially with its antivibration products, has become a brand that Middle East filter manufacturers are looking for.
Yerli pazarda müşterilerinin ihtiyaç ve beklentilerini kaliteden asla taviz vermeden karşılamayı şiar edinmiş olan ISKA KAUÇUK A.Ş. 2010 yılından itibaren ihracat aktivitelerine başlamış ve bugün itibarı ile dört kıtaya farklı sektörler için ürün tedariğini sürdürmektedir. Özellikle antivibrasyon ürünleri ile Avrupa pazarının gözdesi olan kuruluşumuz, Orta Doğu filtre üreticilerinin aradığı bir marka olmayı başarmıştır.

Kauçuk esaslı elastomerik ürün tedariğinde %100 müşteri memnuniyeti ilkesi ile hareket eden ISKA KAUÇUK A.Ş. bunu her biri kendi alanında uzmanlaşmış çalışan kadrosu ve kuruluşundan itibaren elinde bulundurduğu ISO 9001 belgesi ile taahhüt altına almış bulunmaktadır.

Kuruluşumuz başlangıçtan itibaren her yılını büyümeyle devam ettirmekte ve hitap ettiği sektörlerde güvenilirliğin markası olmak için her geçen gün artan bir kapasiteyle Türk Kauçuk Sektörünün lokomotifi olmak iddiasını sürdürmektedir.

Kale Kayışları 1975 yılında faaliyete başladığı kauçuk bant sektöründe ilk olarak transmisyon kayışı, patoz kayışı ve lastik levha üretimi ile yola çıkmış daha sonra konveyör bant üretimine başlamıştır. Yaklaşık 48 yıllık geçmişinde, Kale Kayışları daima yüksek kaliteli ürünler üretip müşterilerinin beğenisine sunmuştur.

Firmamız tarafından üretilen tüm ürünler tüm dünyada kabul görmüş olan ISO ve DIN normlarına göre ve ayrıca Türkiye`de geçerli olan TSE normlarına uygun olarak üretilmektedir.
Firmamız ISO9001-2000 sertifikasını 2004 yılında almaya hak kazanmıştır.

2005 yılında fabrikamız İstanbul`un Silivri ilçesindeki 80.000 m2 kapalı üretim ve depolama alanına sahip yeni tesislerine taşınmıştır.
Fabrikamız günlük 8000 mt. bant üretim kapasitesine sahiptir. Üretimimizin yaklaşık olarak %80`i dünyanın dört bir yanındaki 140`tan fazla ülkeye ihraç edilmektedir.
Müşteri memnuniyeti, kaliteli üretim ve zamanında teslimat firmamızın öncelik ve önem verdiği noktaların başında gelmektedir.

Name: MJ TSR
Description:
MJ TSR is a global company that has been growing for over 50 years based on its accumulated technology and world-class quality since its establishment in 1973.

The company has played a role in the development of the industrial plant field by producing industrial special rubber products and industrial rubber linings. It has expanded its business to polyethylene lining and high-frequency bending in collaboration with DHF, a world-renowned Japanese high-frequency industrial company. As a result, MJ TSR is now a leading manufacturer of industrial pipe processing in the world.

The driving force behind MJ TSR's growth in the rapidly changing industrial environment was its belief in realizing the best quality in the world. Through continuous innovation, it has led the way in technology, and its passionate research and development for creating the best products has made MJ TSR a strong and unwavering company.

MJ TSR is committed to becoming a reliable partner in all industrial fields as a competitive global company that creates new future value for customers and industries in the 21st century.

Name: Grupo Borilli
Description:
Quando abrimos nossa borracharia, nos anos 80, algo nos dizia que a nossa caminhada representaria muito para o mercado.

Não somente pela tradição em fazer sempre melhor ou pela ambição em crescer, mas também por saber da nossa responsabilidade com a segurança dos nossos clientes.

Nossa maior preocupação sempre foi em fazer com que nossos clientes rodassem com tranquilidade. O crescimento veio como consequência de uma postura honesta e transparente na nossa relação com eles.

Foi dessa essência que surgiu nossa vocação em fabricar pneus de alta performance. E o off road representa tudo o que sempre buscamos. Dedicação, esforço, técnica e a satisfação incomparável de alcançar objetivos. Ele nos traz a oportunidade de atender clientes que compartilham desta mesma filosofia – a de buscar sempre o seu melhor. 

Esta é a Borilli Racing, uma empresa que não para de evoluir, assinando itens de altíssima qualidade, expandindo sua atuação de mercado e construindo o futuro com responsabilidade, através do esporte e das novas gerações. 

Cada pneu produzido aqui leva este legado, cultivado pelos valores de nossa família e se estendendo à cada colaborador. É isso que nos fez líderes de mercado em apenas 5 anos de existência. É isso que abre as portas para o mundo e que nos motiva a cada dia. 

Somos um grupo de apaixonados pelo que fazemos e jamais vamos diminuir o ritmo em busca da perfeição.

Borilli Racing – Nossa vida é off road!

Name: AnVa Polytech AB
Description:
Verksamhetens anor sträcker sig hela vägen tillbaka till mitten av 1960-talet. Vi är sedan 2014 en del av AnVa-koncernen under namnet Polytech.
Vi är en kvalificerad partner inom utveckling och tillverkning av produkter i gummi, TPE och silikon, med hög kompetens hela vägen från idé till leverans av tjänst och produkt. I vårt materiallabb utvecklar vi skräddarsydda material utifrån kundens specifikation, samt utformar materialet för att passa miljön produkten ska vistas i. Eftersom vi blandar vårt gummi själv har vi en flexibilitet som är svår att hitta på annat håll. Även de produkter vars exakta material inte är något vi har, kan vi utveckla i vårt labb till att ha de egenskaper som efterfrågas. Vår blandningsavdelning har vi i Sunne. Vid behov är vi gärna med i utvecklingen av en produkt från dess ritning hela vägen till att den har färdigställts. Vi kan utveckla en idé, avgöra vilka krav på egenskaper som bör ställas på materialet och ta fram den slutprodukt som passar ditt behov.

Name: Danang Rubber Joint Stock Company (DRC)
Description:
DRC Tire – Vietnam’s Leading Tire Manufacturer
With over 50 years of experience, DRC Tire (Danang Rubber Joint Stock Company) has grown from an American military retreading factory into a top-tier tire manufacturer in Vietnam.

At DRC, human resources are key to our success. Our experienced leadership team and skilled engineers — many trained abroad — ensure high product quality and continuous innovation. United, confident, and responsible, our staff is the driving force behind every DRC tire.

 Advanced Production & Quality Control
DRC Tire constantly invests in modern equipment and technology to deliver durable, high-performance tires. Key production highlights include:
270-liter automatic mixing line for consistent rubber compounds.

Triplex extruder (Germany) produces abrasion-resistant treads.
Modern tire building machines ensure balanced structure and safety.
Automated curing systems guarantee proper vulcanization.

Strict compound testing with rheometers, tensile testers, and dispergraders.
Final tire tests on balancing and endurance machines eliminate defects.
Only products that meet our strict quality standards are released with a warranty card.
 Certified for Global Standards
Certified ISO 9001 quality management system.
Meets Japanese Industrial Standard (JIS) for motorcycle and car tires.
Compliant with U.S. DOT 119 safety standards for automotive tires.
 Choose DRC tire for proven durability, international quality, and trusted performance on every road.

Our values are, above all, transparency and integrity, fostering trust between us to build long-lasting relationships while taking current and future environmental challenges into account.

S A RUBBER INDUSTRIES

S A RUBBER INDUSTRIES, founded in 2012, is a leading rubber product manufacturing company with expertise in serving various industries. Our founder began his career as a helper in the rubber industry and, with unwavering determination, worked his way up to become a manager in a well-reputed company. In 2012, fueled by his passion and experience, he decided to establish his own venture in the rubber manufacturing sector.

At S A RUBBER INDUSTRIES, we specialize in producing high-quality rubber products that cater to a wide range of industries. Our versatile product offerings find applications in the following sectors:

1. Pharmaceutical Machineries: We provide rubber components and solutions for  pharmaceutical machinery manufacturers, ensuring optimal performance and safety.

2. Automotive: Our rubber products play a crucial role in the automotive industry, providing sealing, vibration control, and safety solutions for various applications.

3. Electrical: Our rubber solutions for the electrical industry ensure insulation, protection, and reliable performance in electrical systems and equipment.

4. Chemical industry: Rubber products.

5. Printing & Paper: We provide precision-engineered rubber products that contribute to smooth printing operations and paper handling.

6. Power Generation: Our rubber components are designed to withstand high temperatures, pressure, and environmental conditions, making them suitable for power generation equipment and systems.

7. Agricultural Industry: We offer agricultural machinery manufacturers reliable rubber solutions that enhance productivity and performance in farming operations.
8. Petroleum: Our specialized rubber products ensure reliable sealing and containment in petroleum processing, exploration, and transportation.

As a testimony to our expertise and commitment to quality, we have collaborated with esteemed clients, including a prominent rubber exporter in India who primarily exports to Europe.

Op dezelfde locatie bevindt zich Orbit NV, onze partner gespecialiseerd in rubbertracks voor graafmachines. Samen bieden we een complete oplossing voor duurzame mobiliteit in industriële en bouwtoepassingen.

It has got two facilities and the state-of –the-art plants are located at Kanjikode, Palakkad in Kerala and at Swaminathapuram, Dindugul district, Tamil nadu. Both the factories are at close proximity to Kerala, the heartland of natural rubber in India.   Rubfila produces both Talc Coated Rubber Thread (TCR) as well as Silicon Coated Rubber Thread (SCR) with a total installed capacity of 27500 Tons per annum (TPA). The rubber threads produced by Rubfila strictly adhere to the global standards such as ISO 2321, ASTM D 2433 and BSI 5421.

As a part of its endeavours in quality assurance & environment safe guard, the company is certified with ISO 9001:2015 & ISO 14001 : 2015 by BVQI. Rubber threads by Rubfila are also certified with Oeko-Tex 100, considered to be the gold standard for products in the textile chain.  Rubfila have been recognised as "Export House" by the Ministry of Commerce, Government of India and has customers in 30 countries around the world.

In 2014, we relocated to a larger production complex and rebranded our company name to KLKRP, to be aligned with the larger KLK group. It was not until 2022, that we built a disposable examination glove plant, to add to our product portfolio. The factory is equipped with state-of-the-art technology, strategically optimizing value across the supply chain by vertically integrating upstream businesses with downstream capabilities. This involves the utilization of premium latex and nitrile sourced from both our group of companies and selected suppliers who adhere to the highest quality standards. This strategic collaboration enhances the company’s operational efficiency, ensuring a seamless and reliable flow of premium-quality materials for manufacturing processes.

Known as a Trusted Partner in the industry, with over 35 years of industry experience, KLKRP has garnered a reputation as a premier supplier of private-label gloves for numerous prominent brands across the globe. Também contamos com a fabricação e comercialização de acoplamentos das linhas "tipo garra" e "pinos"; sobressalientes diversos (borracha / PU), equivalentes e intercambiáveis a produtos disponíveis no mercado nacional e internacional. 
Contamos com suporte técnico permanente, através da Fábrica, Representantes e/ou Distribuidor Autorizado, com pessoal competente e capacitado, recomendando sempre uma solução ideal para seu equipamento, sem super dimensionamento, sem surpresas, com milhares de aplicações, sejam novas ou substituindo as já existentes, montados em diferentes setores da indústria.

Name: FORECH India Private Limited
Description:
" We are pleased to introduce ourselves as the “FORECH GROUP,” comprising two primary companies: M/s. Forech India Pvt. Limited and M/s. Forech Mining & Construction International LLP.  We take pride in being India’s largest manufacturer of steel cord and textile-reinforced conveyor belts, as well as anti-wear and corrosion-resistant lining rubber sheets. Additionally, we offer a comprehensive range of accessories for material handling installations and equipment, including ceramic and rubber pulley lagging, impact bars, chute and hopper linings, splicing materials, and rubberized mechanical fasteners etc.
 
 With over 40 years of experience in delivering high-quality conveyor products to customers across the globe, our offerings include a complete package and an extensive range of products designed to ensure the efficient and cost-effective operation of conveyor systems. Currently, we produce more than 75 kilometers of conveyor belts every month.

Our manufacturing capabilities are bolstered by four strategically located units across India: two in Dhaturi District Sonepat (Haryana ) and two in Cheyyar District Thiruvannamalai (Tamil Nadu ).  Each facility is equipped with state-of-the-art testing laboratories, with the Cheyyar plant housing an NABL-accredited laboratory to uphold stringent quality standards. Our products cater to a wide array of global industries, including Mining, Steel, Power, Oil & Gas, Quarrying, Cement and Fertilizers etc. We also are a leading manufacturer of Surface protection lining rubber sheets in India, providing solutions for anti-wear, anti-corrosion and chemical-resistant applications. Our facilities produce approximately 650 tons of rubber sheets monthly, with 85% of our output catering to international markets.

Our guiding philosophy has always been to improvise our products with the help of developments that are accurately aligned with the ever evolving needs of our customers / markets.

Überall dort, wo hochviskose, abrasive oder inhomogene Medien wie Schlämme oder pastöse Substanzen gefördert werden müssen, kommen diese speziellen Pumpen, zum Einsatz: Ob als Pumpe in der Bauindustrie, in der Lebensmittelverarbeitung, als Güllepumpen in der Landwirtschaft oder Industriepumpe für die Erdölförderung.

Ein ebenfalls wichtiges Produktfeld sind Wellen und Walzen, die wir mit Gummi und Polyurethan beschichten und in enger Entwicklungspartnerschaft für die Agrartechnik herstellen. Sie finden u.a. bei Rundballenpressen oder an Kartoffelrodern Anwendung.

Weitere Produktbereiche ergänzen unser Portfolio. Dazu zählen wassergeschmierte Schiffswellenlager, die wir für den Schiffbau sowie die Überholung von Schiffsantrieben fertigen. Es gehören aber auch Verschleißschutzmatten aus hochabriebfestem PUR, sowie Dreh- und Fräsbauteile dazu.

Name: AR Reclaim Rubber Industries
Description:
AR Reclaim Rubber Industries is a subsidiary of Anwer Rashid Industries, located in Pakistan. It was founded in 2019, after careful analysis of the continuously increasing, global and local demand for Reclaim Rubber and the readily available, high quality raw material.  Since its inception, AR Reclaim Rubber Industries has served the following industries in Pakistan: Tire, Tube, V-Belt, Conveyor Belt and Auto Parts. Owing to its success in the local market, AR exhibited in the Rubber and Tire Expo 2022 in Ho Chih Minh City, Vietnam with the will to expand into the growing Asian market.  AR Reclaim Rubber Industries has an installed capacity to produce 3000 MT per annum of Tire and Butyl Reclaim Rubber with a plan to add an additional 3000 MT per annum of Butyl Reclaim Rubber within the next few months.


The company's culture of continuous improvement supplemented by rigorous quality control measures, cutting edge technology and open communication with clients has enabled it to become a market leader in all product segments. To ensure the production of high quality Reclaim Rubber, AR constantly monitors their entire process parameters and ensure they conform to the requirements of the customer. The company is in the process of getting ISO-9001:2015 certification for its reclaim rubber business. It has a state-of-the-art on-site laboratory facility with testing conducted on each batch as per ASTM standards before being dispatched to the customer.

Contamos com uma equipe de cinco químicos experientes, dedicados a adaptações, acompanhamento e desenvolvimento personalizado, de acordo com as necessidades específicas de cada cliente.

Produzimos o composto em Master Batch ou acelerado, sempre buscando a excelência em qualidade. Oferecemos o material em diversas formas, como mantas, tiras, cordões ou granulados, conforme a demanda do cliente. Com uma capacidade de produção inicial de 300 toneladas/mês e um projeto de expansão para 500 toneladas/mês, atendemos com eficiência todo o mercado nacional.

Além disso, contamos com um laboratório moderno que acompanha toda a produção, mantendo os padrões de qualidade que definem a marca New Rubber. Estamos comprometidos em superar as expectativas, proporcionando soluções personalizadas e inovadoras em compostos de borracha.

Name: Kuhn + Kaiser GmbH - Dichtungs-und Isoliertechnik
Description:
Wir sind ein familiengeführter Industriebetrieb mit der Leidenschaft für technische Dichtungen. Seit über 30 Jahren sind wir auf die Herstellung von Produkten der Dichtungs- und Isoliertechnik spezialisiert und legen besonderen Wert auf die individuelle Beratung und Betreuung unserer Kunden. 

Die Einsatzbereiche der Produkte sind dabei ebenso vielfältig wie die Materialien, die in unserer Fertigung verarbeitet werden. Ob nach Norm oder kundenindividueller Spezifikation, mit oder ohne spezielle Zulassungen, Standardprodukt oder branchenspezifische Speziallösung - bei uns erhalten Sie Beratung, Herstellung und Service aus einer Hand.

Wir bieten unseren Kunden flexible, schnelle und qualitativ hochwertige Lösungen durch einen breit aufgestellten Maschinenpark, jahrelanges Know-how in der Dichtungsbranche und ein umfangreiches Sortiment an lagerhaltigen Rohmaterialien in unterschiedlichsten Ausführungen an. Eine Wasserstrahlschneidanlage, digitale Schneidplotter, Stanzautomaten und Spezialmaschinen bieten vielfältige Möglichkeiten zur Herstellung kundenindividueller Produkte - bereits ab Losgröße 1.

Wir sind dabei bestrebt, unsere Prozesse im Sinne der Nachhaltigkeit zu überprüfen und kritisch zu hinterfragen. Mit dem Einsatz recycelter Materialien sowie der Rückführung von Produktionsabfällen in den Kreislauf leisten wir so beispielsweise einen Beitrag für mehr Nachhaltigkeit.

Neben der Beratung und Produktentwicklung stehen wir Ihnen mit weiteren Services zur Verfügung: ob Kaschierungen, Kommissionierungen, Selbstklebung, Label oder Verpackung: bei uns erhalten Sie alles aus einer Hand.

Quality you can trust — we’re ISO9001:2015 certified and committed to continuous improvement.

Rubber rollers, plumbing/molding parts, hoses & tubing, diaphragms, seals & gaskets, electrically insulative and conductive rubber systems and more.

Name: REKOPLAST Kompozyt
Description:
REKOPLAST jest polskim producentem szerokiej gamy mat izolacyjnych z granulatu gumowego pochodzącego z recyclingu opon samochodowych.
Naszym celem jest wytwarzanie produktów użytkowych z surowców wtórnych w oparciu o innowacyjne technologie. Działalność prowadzimy w zgodzie z obowiązującymi przepisami i wymogami, dotyczącymi bezpieczeństwa produktów oraz w pełnym poszanowaniu i wsparciu dla środowiska naturalnego.
Dzięki zautomatyzowanemu i nowoczesnemu parkowi maszynowemu, wytwarzamy produkty w sposób ciągły, posiadamy szerokie możliwości sterowania wymiarami oraz składem surowcowym produktu końcowego, co pozwala nam oferować także wyroby niestandardowe, będące odpowiedzią na indywidualne wymagania Klientów. Absolutnie bezodpadowy proces produkcyjny jest elementem, który wyróżnia nas na rynku oraz umożliwia przetwarzanie surowców wtórnych w produkty, które same w sobie nadają się w stu procentach do recyclingu. 
REKOPLAST to jednak przede wszystkim ludzie, to prężnie działający zespół specjalistów, w pełni zaangażowany w działania firmy, które zmierzają ku rozwojowi i inwestycjom w kolejne innowacyjne, sprzyjające środowisku naturalnemu, technologie.
Nasze produkty znajdują szerokie zastosowanie w przemyśle budowlanym, w transporcie, sporcie oraz branży opakowaniowej.

So fertigen wir bereits seit über 50 Jahren präzise, klein dimensionierte Gummiformteile. Anfangs als Einzelfirma mit handwerklicher Ausrichtung, heute als mittelständischer Weltmarktführer und international anerkannter Hersteller von Qualität „Made in Germany”, eingebettet in eine starke, international agierende Firmengruppe.

ustomer satisfaction is the main goal that BeltTS is pursuing, providing the experience and flexibility of a successful team in the production of truly endless belts and filtration belts.

Name: Fothergill Polycom Ltd
Description:
Fothergill Polycom Ltd (formerly Ferguson Polycom Ltd) manufacture and supply rubber compounds and rubber-coated fabrics from a custom-designed, new facility, in Oldham, Lancashire. 

Compounding: Fothergill Polycom Ltd is the leading niche manufacturer of custom and industry standard (such as BS, MoD, ASTM, SAE standards) black filled and coloured masterbatches and compounds. Produced in cut, continuous sheet form, narrow strip and barwell blank form for use in a variety of industries and processes. This includes compression and injection moulding, calendering, coating and extrusion. Both natural and synthetic polymers are processed through our internal or open mill mixers, and we have the flexibility to offer small and single batch requirements, useful for small scale development work or highly-specialised compound requirements.

Fabric coating: The proofing of textiles with rubber has its’ historical roots in the Manchester area, and Fothergill Polycom Ltd has been heavily involved at the forefront in the development of processes and products since 1911. 

With the benefit of in-house compounding, Fothergill Polycom Ltd offer a diverse and in many cases specialist and unique range of coated products such as:
Natural Rubber/Cotton for use in rain/fashion wear & military survival suits
Polychloroprene/Nylon for use in life preserving and military apparel
Butyl/Nylon for use in life preserving systems, dry suits, trilaminates for leisure and professional diving use
Butyl/Polycotton for use in camera bags and hand luggage
Polychloroprene/Glass for use in flexible connectors, fire blankets and welding drapes
Silicone/Glass for use as fire blankets

Name: Dashmesh Group India
Description:
The Dashmesh Group , founded in 2005 by Shri Rajendra Singh Popli and his son Shri Amritpal Singh Popli, focus on zero waste technology in tire recycling. Their sustainable approach reuses, recycles, or repurposes all tire components, transforming waste into valuable materials and reducing environmental impact. Key methods include mechanical shredding, cryogenic grinding, and steel recovery. This process not only reduces landfill waste but also contributes to a circular economy by turning used tires into resources for new products.

Initially the Group indulged in manufacturing of Rubber Crumb Powder by the name of A.K Rubber situated at Daman U.T, India and by 2008 the Group expanded its wing to form another manufacturing plant by the name of Dashmesh Rubber Industries Private Limited manufacturing Whole Tyre Reclaim Rubber located in Sarigam, Gujarat, India.

We manufacture only REACH COMPLIANCE products and we proudly promote and support the GO GREEN initiative by recycling and reusing all the waste produced again in manufacturing process thus generating ZERO waste.

Au terme du processus de fabrication du produit fini, l'entreprise aura récupéré et réutilisé tous les déchets issus des différentes étapes de transformation. Name: MCT Brattberg UAE
Description:
MCT Brattberg is the inventor of the Multi Cable Transit seal. World leader in the design, development and manufacture of Multi Cable and Pipe transits. It has evolved to become stronger over the years in response to meeting the ever tougher demands on product quality and certification.

The round RGP frame was introduced in the 1970s. At first it was designed for core-drilled holes in concrete. Today it is even installed in the decks and bulkheads of ships.

Lycron rubber for our insert blocks was introduced in 1986. The same year saw the launch of the composite compression plate with integrated compression bolt. Pre-lubricated blocks, a long awaited feature that saves a great deal of time during installation, arrived in 1994.

In 1997 we introduced AddBlock, the universal block, which soon became a success. In certain markets today AddBlock dominates. U-blocks and Plugs arrived in 1999. These together with AddBlocks provide cable and pipe transits with increased flexibility for solving problems in the best and easiest way.

2017, MCT Brattberg introduced the Handiblock. This module compliments our existing system.  It gives you greater flexibility without the doubt!

Today, the company is a modern industrial business with the MCT Brattberg System as main product. An extensive global dealer network ensures the product's availability in most markets. Exports from Sweden constitute roughly 95% of sales. 

MCT Brattberg, always 'Putting Safety First' whatever we do !

Kuruluşumuzdan itibaren, endüstriyel ihtiyaçlara özel çözümler geliştirmek için sürekli olarak Ar-Ge çalışmalarına ve teknolojik yeniliklere yatırım yapıyoruz. Modern üretim tesislerimiz ve uzman ekibimiz ile her türlü elastomer talebine esnek ve etkili çözümler üretiyoruz.

Müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak, kalite kontrol süreçlerimizde titizlikle çalışıyor ve her aşamada mükemmeliyet hedefliyoruz. Amacımız, sektördeki hızla değişen dinamiklere uyum sağlayarak, global pazarda güçlü bir konum elde etmektir.

DEG Elastomer Çözümleri A.Ş. olarak, çevreye duyarlı üretim anlayışımız ve yenilikçi çözümlerimizle sektörde güvenilir bir iş ortağı olmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Name: HI TECH TYRES PVT LTD
Description:
About Hi Tech Tyres:
Established in 2003, Hi Tech Tyres is a pioneering force in tire retreading in Central India. We have been dedicated to providing top-notch retreading services from our unit in Nagpur.

 Our Expertise:
Hi Tech Tyres stands out as the only company with the capability to retread tires of all sizes, catering to motorcycles, cars, jeeps, mini trucks, vans, commercial buses, trucks, tractors, and OTR (Off the Road) tires.

 Versatility in Retreading:
What sets us apart is our unique ability to offer both cold and hot retreading options. When you choose Hi Tech Tyres, you get to pick the right retreading process tailored to your tire's condition, ensuring optimal quality and performance.

 Efficient Inspection System:
We have implemented an efficient inspection system for casings and a high-quality retreading process. Each tire undergoes meticulous inspection and processing, enabling multiple retreads for the same casing.

 Customer Benefits:
Competent inspection, quality repair, and our advanced retreading processes ensure multiple retreads, leading to the lowest cost per kilometer and optimal tire life. At Hi Tech Tyres, we prioritize delivering cost-effective and long-lasting solutions to our customers.

 Quality Materials:
We use premium tread rubber and compounds made from the finest raw materials. Our materials undergo rigorous laboratory testing to guarantee superior quality and performance.

 Total Tyre Care Solution:
Hi Tech Tyres goes beyond retreading; we offer a comprehensive tire care solution. This includes expert advice and tips on tire maintenance, proper fitment, and timely removals. Our aim is to ensure that customers derive maximum life from every tire purchase before it becomes unserviceable.

Name: Tyromer Inc.
Description:
When rubber is formed into a tire, it is vulcanized. This is a process where the rubber is mixed with sulfur and exposed to heat. The result is a hard, durable rubber product – the tires we know today. Vulcanized rubber is difficult to reuse because it cannot be easily reformulated or remixed – but that’s exactly where Tyromer devulcanization gets to work.

Simple is Better. Tyromer’s patented devulcanization process is straightforward – Crumb rubber is fed into the extruder, and devulcanized rubber is extruded out. No chemicals added, no additives at all. The resulting product is called TDP or Tire-Derived Polymer which is used in new rubber product manufacturing. TDP can typically be used in higher levels than other recycled rubbers.

Name: RUBBER CONVERSION
Description:
Rubber Conversion is an Italian cleantech company redefining how the rubber industry approaches circularity.

We develop and supply high-quality sustainable rubber compounds from production off-cuts and End-of-Life Tyres, enabling manufacturers to integrate recycled content without compromising mechanical performance or reliability.

Our technology is patented, science-driven, and designed for industrial scalability. At its core is an ambient-temperature, ambient-pressure mechanical shear process, activated by a green powdered devulcanizing agent that selectively breaks sulphur crosslinks while preserving the original properties of the compound. This ensures stable, high-performance circular materials with a significantly lower carbon footprint.

Product–Service Range
1) SRC: Sustainable Rubber Compounds
High-performance, devulcanized circular compounds engineered to meet demanding application requirements.

2) RDS: Rubber Devulcanization Service
Industrial devulcanization of pre- and post-consumer rubber waste streams, enabling manufacturers to convert their own material flows into new value.

3) LOGOS plug & play plants + Technology Licensing
Access to our proprietary, patented devulcanization technology for partners seeking to localize and scale circular rubber production.

Our solutions deliver high dynamic loading factors, measurable CO₂ reduction, and significant cost efficiencies, proven in collaboration with European tire and technical rubber goods manufacturers.

Rubber Conversion is recognized with the EcoVadis Gold Medal (Top 5%) and its leadership acknowledged among Meaningful Business Global Leaders, reflecting our commitment to industrial innovation, sustainability, and responsible value creation.
