Depuis 1974, ITC Elastomères est spécialisée dans l’étude et la réalisation de pièces techniques en élastomères. Nous intervenons dans des domaines caractérisés par un haut niveau d’exigence tels que : l’Aéronautique, la Défense, Sports mécaniques, l'Énergie ainsi que le Médical.

Notre société est l’une des rares PME à savoir maîtriser l'ensemble du métier du caoutchouc:
la formulation des élastomères,  la conception des outillages,  le mélangeage,  la vulcanisation,  les contrôles et qualifications en environnement des produits livrés. ITC est certifiée ISO 9001-2000 et EN 9100-2003, et a engagé fin 2007 une démarche ISO 14001 – 1,2,3. 
Notre préoccupation pour la Qualité et notre organisation, flexible et réactive, sont entièrement consacrées à votre satisfaction.

Name: KPM Plasto Rubber Co.,
Description: Over the last 20 years, with a rich history of product quality and development, earned a reputation as a specialized leading manufacturer and exporter of Industrial and allied rubber products. Be it sealing or damping or any other kind of critical applications we mold ourselves according to the needs of the customer. From small, family-owned businesses to multinational companies, we provide many customers throughout India and across the world with the products, quality, and service that you would expect from a leader. We excel in custom moulded parts that require close tolerances and complexity in design. Our products range from a wide variety of Valve seats, Metal bonded parts, Potable water parts, Gaskets, Seals, O rings and PU castings. Being certified from ANSI / NSF / CAN 61, KPM’s products are found to be safe in drinking water equipment and applications. We are concerned not only with meeting the needs of the industries we serve today, but are also committed to developing technologies and products for the customers and markets of the future. The factory in-houses a well-equipped modern machinery, testing laboratory with all facilities to test rubber products. Stringent quality control along with closely well knitted formulation suitable for various rubber products has made the ultimate choice of many customers. In addition to supply sophisticated proves products to satisfy our customer needs, we specialize in proving expert technical consultation to help our customer obtain optimum performance with all of our products.

Name: Elastotech
Description:
Elastotech contains the experience gained in more than 40 years of activity in the sector of elastomer moulding for the most diverse uses, from parts of refined design to components with exceptional technical performance for the most demanding industrial sectors.

Today, our company expands over a surface of 30.000 m², 16.000 m² of which are covered, and has a warehouse that insures prompt delivery thanks to it containing billions of stocked pieces, and we are capable of producing up to 18.000.000 pieces per day.

Raw compounds enter our factories and leave as finished products. All processes, from moulding to trimming, from tumbling to facing, are carried out completely on our premises. This allows us to check the product during each phase of manufacture and to guarantee an excellent quality/price relationship. Production is divided between O-Rings and components realised according to our clients' designs

Name: Aero Rubber Company, Inc.
Description:
Aero Rubber Company is an ISO 9001:2015 certified, World Class Manufacturer and Supplier of Industrial Rubber Products.  With over 50 years in the business, our knowledge of rubber and all of its different elastomers is unmatched in the industry, and can guide you in solving your problems before they even start.  Put our skilled sales team to work for you.

Aero Rubber has two divisions. 

The Specialty Division specializes in the production of custom molded, extruded, and die-cut rubber products and rubber sheet manufactured in accordance with customers' specified requirements.  Customized solutions include molded rubber parts, extruded rubber parts, rubber gaskets and seals, rubber sheet, rubber tubing and custom hose and sleeves. 

The Rubber Band Division specializes in providing industrial rubber bands for many uses, as well as custom-printed rubber bands for advertising and promotional purposes.  We offer the most comprehensive selection of rubber band products to be found anywhere.  From your typical stationery rubber bands to pallet bands to secure your warehouse loads, if we don't have it, we’ll custom fabricate the rubber band product that you need based on your specifications.  And, if it's custom printed bands you are looking for, we are unique to offer soft silicone bands for advertising and promotional purposes.  Imagine the Possibilities! 

Our commitment to our customers is evident in our Quality Policy "Our Customers Define Quality - We Make It Happen!"  

Contact us today to get started.  Call (800) 662-1009 to discuss your needs with an Aero Sales Engineer. 

Aero Rubber Company is based out of the south suburbs of Chicago, IL, United States.

Name: DLR Elastomer Engineering Ltd
Description:
DLR Elastomer Engineering are experts in the design, development and manufacture of specialised rubber products.
With origins dating back to 1895, Leyland Rubber Components, Birmingham Rubber Company and most recently Elastomer Engineering all form part of the DNA of DLR Elastomer Engineering.
Based in Leyland, in the heart of Lancashire we remain a proud UK manufacturer and continue to remain at the forefront of rubber and elastomer technology, offering unrivalled technical support and manufacturing capability.
Our focus on developing solutions and collaborating with our customers to push performance limits has ensured we remain a leader in the field of elastomer technology. 
Our skills and capability are truly transferable which is evident in our customer base that occupy sectors from Aerospace and Defence to Food, Pharmaceutical and Luxury Consumer products.

Name: RUSTIN Caoutchouc
Description:
RUSTIN is a rubber manufacturer of quality custom rubber goods.  We offer highly skilled engineers and technicians, for rubber compounds, sealing design to in house Die and tooling constructions.  One expertise & in house technology to manufacture the most difficult extruded rubber parts, molds products and many Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) parts.
RUSTIN rubber products are designed for demanding applications, wether they have to seal, stop, absorb, enclose, protect or contain, under specific regulations. 
Unlike other rubber manufacturer, we have all of our services under one roof.  This enables every element of material formulation and mixing, along with development and finished product manufacture, to be closely controlled and quickly adjusted. RUSTIN has an Experienced manufacturing personnel, and dedicated top quality control experts, to create a one stop service for customers around the world.  We are dedicated to the environment, customer care, top quality products at the best possible cost.

To meet special quality characteristics according different demands from the railway technology, we are in position to develop our own rubber compounds in our laboratory, inspect the property with our specialist from production and equipment, and finally our tooling expert and designer  deliver the right product at the right time.

Our plant manufacturing bases are ISO 9001 and ISO TS 22163.
Location: La Chartre-sur-le-Loir, Pays de la Loire

Name: VIP-Polymers Ltd
Description:
VIP-Polymers are World Class provider of Globally approved sealing gaskets. Since 1923, VIP have been at the forefront of polymer engineering and are now recognised as one of the leading Global providers of sealing solutions for a number of applications:

Pipelines - for the transportation of drinking and dirty water
VIP are proud to be the preferred seal supplier to a number of leading global pipe manufacturers operating in the ductile iron, clay, plastic and concrete pipeline market sectors. VIP manufactures over 3,000 products, and has introduced many new proprietary products for pipeline applications, including VIPSeal flexible couplings, VIP-Weco no-dig pipe repair seal and Tyton-SIT gaskets for ductile iron pipe. 

Tunnels - ensuring they remain watertight
VIP manufacture a range of tunnel segment gaskets for segmentally lined tunnels including glued-in, hyrophilic and cast-in gaskets (which have received a UK patent - International patent pending)

Rail - VIP have developed a range of noise suppression and anti-vibration components including rail pads.

VIP's in house rubber compounding facilities and laboratory ensures that our range of rubber compounds meet many international standards and approvals giving exceptional global coverage.

Whatever the application, VIP's team of highly experienced engineers are ready to develop innovative solutions to any sealing requirement. Utilising industry leading development, design and product testing facilities, VIP have the practical experience and engineering know-how to get your sealing component to market in the shortest possible time.

Name: GUMMI STRICKER GmbH
Description:
Seit 1932 ist die heutige Firma GUMMI STRICKER im Markt für Fördertechnik tätig und hat sich seitdem als führender Spezialist für technische Lösungen mit Gummi- und anderen Elastomerprodukten für Förderanlagen in der Schüttgut, Automobil und Recyclingbranche etabliert. Das Unternehmen wird in dritter Generation von Wolfgang und Beatrice Stricker geführt. In den über 90 Jahren sind zahlreiche Partnerschaften mit Kunden und Lieferanten gewachsen genauso wie mit den Mitarbeitenden, die z.T. mehr als 30 Jahre bei GUMMI STRICKER beschäftigt sind. 

GUMMI STRICKER produziert und vertreibt qualitativ hochwertige Gummi- und Elastomerprodukte, die in vielfältigen Anwendungen zum Einsatz kommen – von Förderbändern, über Manschetten, Dichtungen, Auskleidungen und Zuschnitten bis hin zu Schläuchen und komplexen Formteilen. 

Unsere Leistungen:
 Fördergurte
 Wellenkantengurte manuwell 
 Anlagenzubehör manuflex-Abstreifer und manuzent Zentrierstationen und weitere 
 Automobil-Sondergurte 
 Zuschnitte 
 Manschetten und Dichtungen
 Auskleidungen 
 Schlauchtechnologie
 Kundenspezifische Formteile und andere Sonderartikel aus Gummi 
 systematische Wartung, Reparaturen vor Ort sowie Not-Montagen 24/7 

Durch unsere Fertigungsmöglichkeiten gewährleisten wir eine hohe Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit unserer Produkte. Unsere Kunden profitieren von unserer langjährigen Erfahrung, innovativen Lösungen und dem Engagement eines hoch qualifizierten Teams von rund 50 Mitarbeitern.

Mit einer hohen Fertigungstiefe und Flexibilität können wir schnell auf individuelle Kundenanforderungen reagieren und maßgeschneiderte Lösungen bieten. Als mittelständisches, inhabergeführtes Familienunternehmen zeichnen wir uns durch kurze Entscheidungswege, eine hohe Flexibilität und eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Kunden aus.

Name: Rubber Matters Private Limited
Description:
Welcome to Rubber Matters, creators of eco-friendly superlative reclaim rubber. By adopting (and perfecting) a collection of industry-leading best practices, we are a company that can reliably cater to the ever increasing demand for high grade reclaim rubber.
Driven by our commitment to quality, our fully equipped lab ensures that every product meets – then surpasses international quality standards. In many ways, Rubber Matters is the kind of company with a walk that can back the talk.

Our Products:

Crumb Rubber
Produced from automotive and truck scrap tires, our crumb rubber mix contains granules in the 1-4mm size range.

Rubber Powder

Our rubber powder is extremely fine and is created through ambient granulation as well as cryogenic milling. It is available in two grades:
1.	30 Mesh
2.	60 Mesh 

Reclaim Rubber

Reclaim rubber is made by devulcanizing scrap rubber, which is used as a cost-effective raw material in the rubber industry.

Name: JIAXING TAITE RUBBER CO., LTD
Description:
Founded in 2003, JIAXING TAITE RUBBER CO., LTD is a Sino-German joint venture specialized in rubber tracks and rubber pads manufacture. Drawing from the decades of R&D experience of our German partner, and by the endeavor of our technical staff, Taite now possesses strong technical resource and several patents in rubber track industry. This enables our products to precede others' in both diversity and quality.

Since its establishment, Taite strives to build a modern enterprise with high efficiency. Our company has built a laboratory with comprehensive equipments, as well as several workshops with advanced manufacturing facilities. Taite is qualified with ISO9001-2015 quality management system. Besides, we have also imported IATF16949 to guide our process control. In the workshop, Taite runs complete 6S management and lean production to ensure stable and high level quality of our products. In this way, Taite realizes an effective system to prevent failure and flaw during manufacturing, and reduces the deviation in supply chain. Moreover, these effort we have done enable us the ability to produce customized products for our clients.

We produce a variety of rubber tracks and rubber pads that can be widely applied in construction machinery, agricultural machinery and other specialized vehicles. Most of our products are sold to Europe, America, Australia etc. In more than 10 years development, Taite has established long-term and stable cooperative relationship with some famous OEM customers, and widely won recognition and praise from them.

In the future, we will continue to concern from the perceptive of our customers, and constantly strive for perfection in all aspects: technology research, product quality, service and cost performance.
Welcome domestic and oversea customers come to our company for cooperation. (Tel:84632208 Web:Http://www.skidsteer-rubbertracks.com )

Name: ZAGROS Rubber Manufacturing
Description:
Zagros Rubber Manufacturing, a leading rubber production company, was established in 1991. With a focus on creating top-quality rubber sheets, the company offers a wide range of sheets that come in various types and thicknesses. These sheets include linen rubber, plain double-sided sheets that are oil-proof or NBR, acid-proof or EPDM, chloroprene, or CR sheets. Zagros Rubber Manufacturing is proud to be the first producer of tube seals and scuff bands, which are known for their exceptional durability and reliability.
Tucked away in the Shkouhie industrial zone, lies a factory spanning across a vast area of 2,000 square meters. The factory is dedicated to manufacturing an array of specialized rubber products, including a wide range of rubber sheets with varying materials and thicknesses and top-quality rubber conveyor belts that adhere to ISO and BS standards. With a compounding unit, the factory produces reinforced and unreinforced neoprene shock absorbers based on AASHTO M251, BS 5400, DIN 4141, ISO 6446, ASTM D4014, EN 1337 standards, tailored to the needs and wants of customers.
Moreover, the factory produces a variety of rubber parts to cater to an array of industries, including oil, gas, petrochemicals, refineries, power plants, steel making, tile and ceramic, pipe making, chemical industries, aircraft manufacturing, agriculture and industry, pharmaceutical industries, textile, defense industries, machine building, road construction, bridge construction, and many more. The factory uses only the finest materials and ensures that each product undergoes laboratory inspection and quality control approval before delivering it to customers.
The factory prides itself on its ability to execute research projects, which enables it to produce a diverse range of products and parts in the shortest possible time while maintaining an ideal quality that follows global and international standards.The credibility of our products is the satisfaction of customers in all industries

Name: RORA SRL
Description:
For over 25 years, we have been designing and manufacturing custom technical rubber seals for multiple industries: automotive, medical, aerospace, hydrogen, thermal, and aesthetic applications.
We develop and produce membranes, bellows, cable grommets, two-component parts, O-rings, and other products tailored to our clients’ specific requirements. Raw materials are carefully selected based on customer needs, technical specifications, and verified through precise analyses.
Our primary rubber materials include: ACM (Acrylic Rubber), AEM (Ethylene Acrylic Rubber), CR (Chloroprene Rubber), EPDM (Ethylene-Propylene-Diene Monomer), FPM/FKM (Fluoroelastomer Rubber), FMQ/FVMQ (Fluorosilicone Rubber), HNBR (Hydrogenated Nitrile Rubber), NBR (Acrylonitrile-Butadiene Rubber), NR (Natural Rubber), SBR (Styrene-Butadiene Rubber), and VMQ (Silicone Rubber).
All our processes are backed by internationally recognized certifications:
ISO 9001:2015 – Continuous quality improvement
IATF 16949:2016 – Automotive sector requirements
UNI EN 9100 – Aerospace quality management
ISO 14001:2015 – Environmental compliance
ISO 50001:2018 – Energy efficiency management
TISAX – Data privacy and security
100% Made in Italy.

Name: Truck Bus Industria e Comércio de Auto Peças LTDA.
Description:
A Truck Bus tem sua origem fundamentada na necessidade das grandes montadoras de veículos pesados instaladas no Brasil de desenvolver fornecedores locais qualificados e capacitados, na década de 70.
Neste cenário, as montadoras se viam obrigadas a importar quase todas as autopeças para sua produção.
Com visão estratégica e determinação, nossa equipe focou as atividades para este mercado, técnico e exigente, mas carente em serviços e produtos customizados para suas necessidades específicas.
Ao longo dos anos, nacionalizamos autopeças,
desenvolvemos projetos próprios, criamos

Name: Tulsi Rubber Products Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Tulsi Rubber Products Pvt. Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of engineered rubber hoses and elastomeric solutions catering to the automotive, industrial, defence, and OEM segments.

With decades of hands-on manufacturing experience, we specialise in the design and production of smooth, moulded, wrapped, and silicone rubber hoses, along with customised rubber components developed for application-specific performance. Our capabilities are supported by strong in-house expertise in rubber compounding, material selection, process engineering, and quality control.

Tulsi Rubber products are widely used in coolant and radiator systems, air intake and filtration systems, oil and fuel lines, compressors, anti-vibration systems, gensets, and heavy-duty engines, where reliability under heat, pressure, vibration, and harsh operating conditions is critical.

We work closely with customers to understand real-world operating environments and engineer solutions that deliver thermal stability, durability, dimensional accuracy, and long service life. Continuous improvement, visual management, and process discipline are embedded into our shop-floor culture.

At Tulsi Rubber, we don’t just manufacture rubber products: we build performance-driven solutions that support safety, efficiency, and long-term reliability across critical applications.

Name: Tesnila GK d.o.o.
Description:
Tesnila GK has been rubber parts manufacturer since 1991. We can pride ourselves on having satisfied customers all around the world. TGK produces injection – moulded parts made of elastomers based on customer's drawings. We produce mid and large series with high quality requirements, high level of precision and sophisticated material specifications. Our products are designed and produced specifically for the customer's applications for automotive and other industries. 
For AUTOMOTIVE INDUSTRY we are producing rubber parts for different applications such as: bowden wires, wire harness, lighting & washing systems, auto electrics and various other applications.
For OTHER INDUSTRIES we are producing rubber parts for different segments: mechanical engineering, electronics, fire-stop systems, track bedding systems, automation and sanitary.


Tesnila GK je proizvajalec gumijastih delov od leta 1991. Pohvalimo se lahko z zadovoljnimi strankami po vsem svetu. Podjetje TGK izdeluje brizgane dele iz elastomerov na podlagi strankinih risb. Izdelujemo srednje in velike serije z visokimi zahtevami glede kakovosti, visoko stopnjo natančnosti in zahtevnimi specifikacijami materialov. Naši izdelki so zasnovani in izdelani posebej za uporabo pri strankah v avtomobilski in drugih industrijah. Za avtomobilsko industrijo izdelujemo gumijaste dele za različne namene, kot so: žice bowden, žičniški snopi, sistemi za razsvetljavo in pranje, avtomobilska elektrika in za različne druge namene. Za OSTALE INDUSTRIJE proizvajamo gumijaste dele za različne segmente: strojništvo, elektroniko, protipožarne sisteme, sisteme tirnih gredic, avtomatizacijo in sanitarno industrijo.

Name: Camisana Srl - Moulding Specialist
Description:
Camisana s.n.c. was founded in 1978; it deals with the processing and moulding of technical articles in rubber, silicone, rubber/silicone-metal and rubber/silicone-plastic. For more than 40 years Camisana has been creating, through moulding, technical items made of organic rubber, silicone and moulded with metals, plastics and composites, offering its customers reliable solutions for their needs. It employs a specialized staff, it practices a quality system in which rules and procedures are respected that allow a correct management of the production system allowing to obtain quality products at competitive costs. We work and mold any type of elastomer, platinum and peroxide silicone, natural and synthetic rubber. We produce thousands of technical items to design such as vibration dampers, caps, manifolds, flat and shaped gaskets, sleeves, OR, grommets, feet, balls, bellows, stators, pads, caps, suction cups etc.. Camisana produces organic and silicone rubber balls for the major and qualified manufacturers of vibrating screens and nutation screens, providing them with a product specific to their customer's needs. In the chemical, pharmaceutical and food industry the balls are moulded with appropriate materials, FDA certified and after their production are ground and sanitized. Each application requires cleaning spheres with optimal characteristics according to the specific needs of use: bounce, antistaticity, resistance to wear, corrosion, load, temperature. 
The company is certified ISO 9001.

Name: Bharati Solutions
Description:
Bharati Solutions | Precision in Sealing Excellence | Official GMORS Distributor – North India

Bharati Solutions is a trusted name in industrial sealing solutions and the official distributor of GMORS – a global leader in high-performance rubber sealing components. Headquartered in Delhi, we proudly serve diverse sectors such as oil & gas, chemical processing, power, water treatment, pharmaceuticals, automotive, and general engineering.

GMORS, based in Taiwan with global manufacturing across China and Thailand, has been a pioneer in rubber sealing since 1986. With ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO/IEC 17025 certified labs, GMORS is known for engineering excellence and product reliability. Bharati Solutions brings these world-class products closer to Indian industries with local expertise, quick response, and end-to-end support.

We offer a comprehensive range of products including:

O-Rings (AS568, JIS, Metric)

X-Rings, T-Seals, FS-Seals, S-Seals

Hydraulic & Pneumatic Seals

Washer & Diaphragms

Metal-Bonded Rubber Seals, Rubber Balls, V-Seals

Packer Elements & Custom Molded Parts

PTFE Coated Seals and LSR Products

From NSF-certified drinking water seals to API 6A and NORSOK M-710 compliant components for harsh oilfield environments, we ensure industry-specific performance and safety.

Our strength lies in understanding customer needs and recommending optimal sealing solutions backed by GMORS’ advanced R&D, FEA simulation, and reliability testing.

Explore tailored sealing solutions, consistent supply, and technical excellence with Bharati Solutions.
 sales@bharatisolutions.com |  www.bharatisolutions.com

Name: MARDEC BERHAD
Description:
MARDEC Berhad, established in 1969 has grown to be one of the largest rubber processors in Malaysia. From its beginning, MARDEC has remained true to its commitment to serve the needs of 250,000 smallholders in South East Asia and global customers.

Our core activities include processing and marketing Technically Specified Rubber (TSR), Latex Concentrate (LC), specialty and downstream rubber products with natural rubber sourced from local and international smallholders, plantation companies and cooperatives. We employ more than 1,300 people and operate 9 rubber processing factories in 4 countries namely Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand and Vietnam with a combined annual processing capacity in excess of 300,000MT.

As the trusted name in rubber, MARDEC’s customers include major global brand tyre producers, glove manufacturers and other industrial users than span across four continents encompassing Asia, North America, Europe and Australia.

MARDEC downstream sector produces various molded, extruded and assembled components for automotive, healthcare, agriculture, oil and gas and building material industries.

Name: Tiflex Ltd
Description:
Welcome to TIFLEX LIMITED, manufacturers of cork and rubber bonded materials for over 70 years.

Tiflex Limited was formed in 1990 from an amalgamation of two well established companies. TICO and The Flexible Cork Company. 

There are approximately 180 skilled people employed at the 99,800 sq ft manufacturing site, with a number of external sales people based around the country.

We undertake high volume production as well as the manufacture of bespoke items, many of which are designed in-house on behalf of our customers. Work is carried out on major projects throughout the world and almost half of our production is sold overseas.

Working closely with our customers, our polymer technologists work to develop solutions to a variety of engineering problems particularly those requiring high performance and product durability.

Name: Reliant Rubber Engineers
Description:
Reliant Rubber Engineers Ltd is a UK-based precision manufacturer specialising in engineered rubber components and industrial laser cleaning.

We support maintenance teams, OEMs, and manufacturers with reliable solutions for performance-critical applications from rubber wheels, rollers and drums to mouldings, seals and bonded assemblies.

Our industrial laser cleaning capability provides a controlled, non-abrasive method for removing rust, coatings, oils, and residues without damaging the underlying substrate ideal for surface preparation, inspection, refurbishment, and restoration work.

Core capabilities include:

• Rubber wheels, rollers & drums (new, re-coat, refurbish)
• Rubber mouldings, seals & gaskets
• Rubber-to-metal bonding & engineered assemblies
• Industrial laser cleaning for surface preparation & restoration
• Flooring and matting supply for industrial and commercial use

Based in Yorkshire we deliver UK manufacturing with fast response and consistent quality, serving customers nationwide.

Enquire today for assessment, lead time, and pricing.

Name: DKL Rubber
Description:
DKL Rubber has been trading since 1988. We are a bespoke rubber manufacturing company with an ability to provide a large range of precision manufactured rubber products in all sizes and volumes.
The company was started to provide high specification rubber mouldings and has been successful in doing this for many years with high customer retention and an ever growing customer base.
DKL has been supplying into many different sectors from Liquid control to automotive as well as highly specified requirements for the over head power transmission sector and safety critical parts in aqua marine applications to name a few
Our team have a vast knowledge of rubber from moulding and compound design through to gasket cutting and material selection. We hold a range of materials in stock for a quick turn-around as well as being able to source materials to then manufacture in to the required shape and size.
We also have a range of Tank Door Seals in stock and if we don’t have the size you require we can join extrusion to the required size eliminating the tooling cost.

We offer the following:-
Compound design
Plastic injection moulding
Compression moulding
Transfer moulding Tool making
Rubber to metal bonding
Rubber to plastic bonding
Gaskets & diaphragms
Rubber covered rollers
Profile grinding
Rubber sheet and matting
Extruded tube and rubber
Tank door seals

Name: Laygo Gaskets S.L.
Description:
At Laygo Gaskets we are dedicated to manufacturing the best rubber gaskets for Plate Heat Exchangers on the market.

We are proud to be the high-quality alternative to original gaskets and, since 1982, we know what really matters in everything related to PHE gaskets.

This is why the leading companies in the chemical, pharmaceutical, food and energy industries use our gaskets for their heat exchangers to their complete satisfaction.

Our plate heat exchanger manufacturing processes are significantly different from those of other manufacturers.

Hence the secret of our success: we never compromise on quality.

All our gaskets are 100% manufactured in our facilities in Cornellà de Llobregat, Barcelona using the best raw materials.

Uma empresa que fabrica anéis da linha SMS, TC, RJT, DIN, IDF, Válvulas Borboletas, entre outros, em diversos tipos de elastômeros.
